result.stdout:
Description:
  Dynamics 365 Finance / Supply Chain Management (D365F&O/SCM) OData CSDL Shortener is a command line tool that makes it easy to make a CSDL file shorter.

Usage:
  D365ODataCsdlShortener [options]

Options:
  -cs, --csdlSourceFilePath <csdlSourceFilePath>                          - a CSDL file path in the local filesystem or a valid URL hosted on an HTTPS server
  -csfe, --csdlEntitySetFilter <csdlEntitySetFilter>                      - a filter parameter that user can use to select a subset of data entities from a large CSDL file. By providing a comma separated list of EntitySet names that appear in the EntityContainer
  -csfa, --csdlActionFilter <csdlActionFilter>                            - a filter parameter that user can use to select a subset of data entity actions from a large CSDL file.By providing a comma separated list of Action names
  -o, --csdlTransformedFilePath <csdlTransformedFilePath>                 - an output directory path for the transformed file
  -ll, --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  - the log level to use when logging messages to the main output [default: Information]
  --version                                                               Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                          Show help and usage information

  Dynamics 365 Finance / Supply Chain Management (D365F&O/SCM) OData CSDL Shortener is a command line tool that makes it easy to make a CSDL file shorter.

Usage:

Options:

  -csfa, --csdlActionFilter <csdlActionFilter>                            - a filter parameter that user can use to select a subset of data entity actions from a large CSDL file.By providing a comma separated list of Action names
  -o, --csdlTransformedFilePath <csdlTransformedFilePath>                 - an output directory path for the transformed file
  -ll, --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  - the log level to use when logging messages to the main output [default: Information]
